verses.1: When Israel departed from Egypt, the house of Jacob from a people of foreign tongue,
verses.2: Judah became God’s sanctuary, Israel His dominion.
verses.3: The sea observed and fled; the Jordan turned back;
verses.4: the mountains skipped like rams, the hills like lambs.
verses.5: Why was it, O sea, that you fled, O Jordan, that you turned back,
verses.6: O mountains, that you skipped like rams, O hills, like lambs?
verses.7: Tremble, O earth, at the presence of the Lord, at the presence of the God of Jacob,
verses.8: who turned the rock into a pool, the flint into a fountain of water!

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
